# openwebui_models_config (Resource)

Manages OpenWebUI models configuration (global settings). This is a singleton resource with a fixed ID. Note: This manages global model settings, different from the openwebui_model resource which manages individual model instances.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `default_models` (String) Default models configuration.
- `model_order_list` (List of String) List of model IDs in preferred order.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Fixed identifier for the models config (always 'models_config').
